title: boerhavia repens subsp. viscosa
intro: Boerhavia repens subsp. viscosa, also known as stickleaf or sticky stickleaf, is a succulent herb native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, characterized by its sticky stems and leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which can help to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Boerhavia repens subsp. viscosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Boerhavia repens subsp. viscosa can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
